meta.scope: Website, dashboard, login, signup, profile, history, balance, support, linking, quests, 2FA, tickets, Discord support, email support, and any future page or feature.
meta.userResponsibility: You are responsible for your username, password, linked accounts, activity, and security decisions made on your account.
meta.staffDiscretion: Staff may review, deny, close, restrict, or escalate requests and tickets at their discretion.

hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.description: By creating an account, using the website, opening a ticket, linking accounts, completing quests, or accessing any related page, you agree to these Terms of Service and all future updates. These terms apply to every feature, page, support channel, and account-related action connected to the service.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
content: Using the service means you accept these terms in full. If you do not agree, you must stop using the website, Discord support, email support, and any related tools or features.
These terms may be updated at any time. Continued use after updates means you accept the updated version.

sections.title: Account Creation, Login, and Credentials
content: You are responsible for your username, password, and login credentials.
There is no guaranteed password recovery.
Recovery may require linked Discord and staff approval.
All activity on your account is your responsibility.

sections.title: Username Responsibility
content: Usernames must not be offensive, misleading, or impersonate staff.
Usernames may be changed or accounts restricted at any time.

sections.title: Email and 2FA Responsibility
content: You are responsible for your email and 2FA setup.
We are not responsible for lost email access or missing codes.

sections.title: Linked Accounts
content: You must correctly link Discord, Roblox, or other accounts.
Incorrect linking may prevent rewards, recovery, or support.

sections.title: Public Profiles
content: Your account may be searchable.
Profile data such as IDs, stats, and linked accounts may be visible.

sections.title: Data Display
content: Stats, rewards, and balances may be delayed or incorrect visually.
Display does not always reflect backend instantly.

sections.title: Quests and Rewards
content: Rewards are not guaranteed.
Features may change or be removed anytime.
Completion does not guarantee payout.

sections.title: Support System
content: Support is provided via Discord, website, or email.
Staff may close, deny, or ignore tickets.
Escalation is not guaranteed.

sections.title: Ticket Risks
content: We are not responsible for leaks, screenshots, or exposure of support messages.

sections.title: Staff Authority
content: Staff decisions are final unless overridden.

sections.title: Logging and Monitoring
content: Activity may be logged including logins, actions, and support interactions.

sections.title: IP Storage
content: IP addresses may be stored for security and abuse prevention.
Abuse may result in blocking or banning.

sections.title: Account Security
content: You are responsible for securing your account.

sections.title: Exploits and Abuse
content: No exploiting, automation, or manipulation.
Violations may result in bans or reward removal.

sections.title: Alternate Accounts
content: Using alt accounts for advantage is not allowed.

sections.title: Bans and Enforcement
content: Accounts may be banned for violations or staff decisions.
Appeals are not guaranteed.

sections.title: Service Availability
content: Service may go offline at any time.
No responsibility for downtime.

sections.title: Data Security
content: Security is not guaranteed.
We are not responsible for breaches.

sections.title: Feature Changes
content: Features may change or be removed anytime.

sections.title: Right to Refuse Service
content: Access may be denied at any time.

sections.title: Independence
content: Not affiliated with Roblox.

sections.title: No Guarantees
content: No guarantees on rewards, recovery, or support outcomes.

sections.title: User Submissions
content: Submitted content may be stored and reviewed.

sections.title: No Liability
content: We are not responsible for damages or losses.

sections.title: Enforcement Rights
content: Failure to enforce rules does not waive rights.

sections.title: Changes to Terms
content: Terms may be updated anytime.

sections.title: Final Agreement
content: You accept all terms and staff authority.

cards.title: Account Recovery
cards.content: Recovery is not guaranteed and may require Discord verification.

cards.title: Support Records
cards.content: Support messages may be stored and reviewed.

extras.footer: This page applies to all current and future features. Continued use means acceptance.
